## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss the Design Engineer role at growthx.ai with potential candidate Georgemaine Lourens](https://fathom.video/share/ek9WjqxjeNysrmL7yQaHq-yb7puV9SPe?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Georgemaine has a strong background in design and front-end development, making him well-suited for a design engineer role](https://fathom.video/share/ek9WjqxjeNysrmL7yQaHq-yb7puV9SPe?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
  - [Marcel shared growthx.ai's vision of revolutionizing content creation and knowledge work through AI-powered workflows](https://fathom.video/share/ek9WjqxjeNysrmL7yQaHq-yb7puV9SPe?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [The company is experiencing rapid growth (7.5M ARR, aiming for 20M this year) and sees potential for expanding into a "cursor-like experience for knowledge work"](https://fathom.video/share/ek9WjqxjeNysrmL7yQaHq-yb7puV9SPe?tab=summary&timestamp=1343.0)
  - [Both parties expressed mutual interest and excitement about the potential collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/ek9WjqxjeNysrmL7yQaHq-yb7puV9SPe?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)

## Topics

### Personal Backgrounds

  - [Georgemaine: Grew up in Netherlands, unique name, self-taught designer, worked at Framer, Mollie, and Pitch](https://fathom.video/share/ek9WjqxjeNysrmL7yQaHq-yb7puV9SPe?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
  - [Marcel: Brazilian-born, moved to Texas, paid way through college with a design agency, worked at IBM, HP, and various startups](https://fathom.video/share/ek9WjqxjeNysrmL7yQaHq-yb7puV9SPe?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)

### growthx.ai's Business Model and Vision

  - [Started as a content creation service, leveraging Marcel's experience in building high-performing content teams](https://fathom.video/share/ek9WjqxjeNysrmL7yQaHq-yb7puV9SPe?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
  - [Evolved into creating AI-powered workflows for knowledge work](https://fathom.video/share/ek9WjqxjeNysrmL7yQaHq-yb7puV9SPe?tab=summary&timestamp=1343.0)
  - [Current focus: Content and SEO services ($160k avg. deal, 48% win rate)](https://fathom.video/share/ek9WjqxjeNysrmL7yQaHq-yb7puV9SPe?tab=summary&timestamp=1547.0)
  - [Long-term vision: Building a platform for executing expert knowledge workflows with AI assistance](https://fathom.video/share/ek9WjqxjeNysrmL7yQaHq-yb7puV9SPe?tab=summary&timestamp=1399.0)

### Design Engineer Role Opportunity

  - [Georgemaine's background in both design and development aligns well with the role](https://fathom.video/share/ek9WjqxjeNysrmL7yQaHq-yb7puV9SPe?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
  - [The position would involve creating user experiences for complex knowledge work tools](https://fathom.video/share/ek9WjqxjeNysrmL7yQaHq-yb7puV9SPe?tab=summary&timestamp=1574.0)
  - [Emphasis on rapid iteration and dogfooding the product](https://fathom.video/share/ek9WjqxjeNysrmL7yQaHq-yb7puV9SPe?tab=summary&timestamp=1605.0)

### Company Growth and Potential

  - [Currently at 7.5M ARR, nearly tripled this year](https://fathom.video/share/ek9WjqxjeNysrmL7yQaHq-yb7puV9SPe?tab=summary&timestamp=1452.0)
  - [Aiming for 20M ARR by year-end](https://fathom.video/share/ek9WjqxjeNysrmL7yQaHq-yb7puV9SPe?tab=summary&timestamp=1458.0)
  - [Sees potential in disrupting the $500B content and growth marketing industry](https://fathom.video/share/ek9WjqxjeNysrmL7yQaHq-yb7puV9SPe?tab=summary&timestamp=1547.0)
  - [Exploring opportunities in AI-assisted knowledge work beyond content creation](https://fathom.video/share/ek9WjqxjeNysrmL7yQaHq-yb7puV9SPe?tab=summary&timestamp=1562.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule a follow-up meeting for more in-depth discussion](https://fathom.video/share/ek9WjqxjeNysrmL7yQaHq-yb7puV9SPe?tab=summary&timestamp=1676.0)
  - [Marcel to regroup with Daniel (presumably another team member) regarding next steps](https://fathom.video/share/ek9WjqxjeNysrmL7yQaHq-yb7puV9SPe?tab=summary&timestamp=1676.0)
  - [Marcel offered to record a Loom video with additional information if needed](https://fathom.video/share/ek9WjqxjeNysrmL7yQaHq-yb7puV9SPe?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Georgemaine to reach out with any questions that arise](https://fathom.video/share/ek9WjqxjeNysrmL7yQaHq-yb7puV9SPe?tab=summary&timestamp=1703.0)
